description: Bandsintown is a live music platform for discovering artists, concerts, and event information, and it also provides tools for artists to promote shows and livestreams. Its public developer offering centers on artist and event data from the Bandsintown catalog.
summary: Bandsintown exposes a read-only HTTP API at `https://rest.bandsintown.com` authenticated by an `app_id` query parameter, plus a public MCP server at `https://prod-chatgpt-app.prod.bandsintown.com/mcp`.
